malaria.kinyarwanda: Malariya iterwa n'imibu. Ibiranga ni umuriro mwinshi, gukonja, gukonja mu mitsi, na kuribwa mu nda. Ivurwa binyuze mu miti ya Coartem cyangwa indi yo kwivura malaria.
malaria.english: Malaria is caused by mosquitoes. Symptoms include high fever, chills, joint pain, and abdominal pain. It is treated with Coartem or other authorized anti-malaria medications.

flu_and_cough.kinyarwanda: Inkorora n'ibicurane bitwara iminsi mike kwikira. Kunywa amazi mwinshi no kuruhuka ni ingenzi. Niba inkorora itinze, sura ivuriro ryawe.
flu_and_cough.english: Flu and cough usually take a few days to clear. Drink plenty of fluids and rest. If the cough persists, visit your local health centre.

injury.kinyarwanda: Niba ufite igikomere gikomeye, gishireho igitambaro gifite isuku cyangwa bande. Niba hari amaraso menshi, tabaza SAMU.
injury.english: For serious injuries, apply a clean cloth or bandage. If there is heavy bleeding, call SAMU emergency.

maternal_health.kinyarwanda: Abategarugori batwite bagomba gusura ivuriro byibuze inshuro umunani kugira ngo bakurikiranwe.
maternal_health.english: Pregnant women should visit the health centre at least eight times for prenatal follow-up.
